Yuan Liang ŤĘĀšļģ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Liang (ŤĘĀšļģ). Severely criticized the faction of Cao Shuang and sided with the Simas. Yuan Liang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
